case_title: MID CENTURY INSURANCE COMPANY vs. WEMEIER, ANN E. et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MID CENTURY INSURANCE COMPANY SERVED NOV-04-2004, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT WEMEIER, ANN E. PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. WRIT MAY ISSUE ON DEC-10-2004 IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT WEMEIER, ANN E.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MID CENTURY INSURANCE COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WEMEIER, ANN E. $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,610.00
